title: Per-repo definition-of-done
description: Spec §7: a list of machine-checkable assertions the harness runs in the Verifying state after the model emits claimed_done: true. Loaded at session start from <repo>/.atelier/dod.json (per-repo) with optional global fallback at ~/.atelier/dod.json. Each check is a shell command with an expected outcome; the Verifying state shells out via §11 sandbox. Distinct from tests/workload/task_checks.v1.json (which is the rig's per-fixture metadata, not loaded at runtime by the harness).

name.description: Stable identifier surfaced in UI / ledger. Matches the hook-manifest name regex so the trust-budget plumbing can treat all named harness primitives the same way.

tier.description: Spec §7 lists test / type-check / lint / build as the canonical DoD tiers. `custom` is the escape hatch for log-line assertions and similar one-offs. UI groups checks by tier.

command.description: Shell command executed inside the §11 sandbox profile. Relative paths resolve against `working_dir` (defaults to repo root).

working_dir.description: Optional repo-relative directory the command runs in. Defaults to repo root. Absolute paths and `..` escapes are rejected by the loader.

timeout_ms.description: Hard per-check timeout. Over-budget = check fails with reason=timeout.

expect.description: At least one assertion must be present; multiple assertions combine with AND.

tags.description: Free-form labels for ad-hoc grouping in the UI (e.g. "slow", "flaky", "pre-merge-only"). Not interpreted by the harness.
